discussions.title: We just launched on Product Hunt!
discussions.body:
Hey everyone — big news: **Discussion Kit** is officially live on Product Hunt today!

If you're not familiar, Discussion Kit is a SvelteKit-powered forum template that uses **GitHub Discussions** as the backend — no server, no database, no auth system to maintain. Just point it at your repo's Discussions tab and you've got a fast, static forum site deployable straight to GitHub Pages, with GitHub handling replies, reactions, and moderation for you.

This forum you're posting in right now is literally running on it 👀

If you've found it useful (or even just mildly interesting), an upvote would mean a lot: 👉 [producthunt.com/products/git-forum](https://www.producthunt.com/products/git-forum)

Would love to hear feedback, feature requests, or just general roasting in the replies.

discussions.title: Anonymous viewing, Reputation, Profiles
discussions.body:
## What's Changed * Implement user profile page and enhance API handling by @NotReeceHarris in https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/pull/11 * Add Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct by @NotReeceHarris in https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/pull/12 * Implement configurable reputation system with UI integration by @NotReeceHarris in https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/pull/14 * Implement cold-store archive with read-only mode for visitors by @NotReeceHarris in https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/pull/16 * Add comprehensive documentation for architecture and data systems by @NotReeceHarris in https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/pull/18 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/compare/v0.1.0...v0.2.0
This discussion was created from the release Anonymous viewing, Reputation, Profiles.

discussions.title: Initial Release (0.1.0)
discussions.body:
## What's Changed * Rename project to Discussion Kit and update configurations by @NotReeceHarris in https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/pull/5 * Refactor authentication and improve discussion loading logic by @NotReeceHarris in https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/pull/7 * Implement moderation features and discussion management capabilities by @NotReeceHarris in https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/pull/9 ## New Contributors * @NotReeceHarris made their first contribution in https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/pull/5 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NotReeceHarris/discussion-kit/commits/v0.1.0
This discussion was created from the release Initial Release (0.1.0).
